chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-387 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.3180/2024 2. For hearing of main case 05-5-2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General for the State.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- On 28-4-2025, following order was passed:- “None present for the applicant; same was the position on the last date of hearing. Under the circumstances, this application is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution; however in the interest of justice adjourned to 05-05-2025.” Today is the same position, none present for the applicant, nor has any intimation received. Under the circumstances, the instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Naveed Ali
